common.noCharacter: No character found. Please select a character.
common.walletNotConnected: Wallet not connected. Please reconnect your wallet.

betaBanner.message: Early Access — Things may break. When in doubt, refresh.

map.spawnTooltip: Spawn onto the map. Monsters lurk beyond the Alcove — tread carefully.

signIn.title: Sign In to Play
signIn.inAppWarning: Google sign-in doesn't work in app browsers. Copy the link below and open it in Chrome or Safari.
signIn.termsAgreement: By signing in you agree to the

connectWallet.depositInfo: A small ETH deposit is needed to cover gameplay fees. Your funds stay in your session and can be withdrawn anytime.

outOfResources.title: Out of Resources
outOfResources.message: You have no ETH for gas and no Gold to auto-swap. You need resources to continue playing.
outOfResources.embeddedAdvice: Fight a monster to earn Gold. Your next transaction will be sponsored so you can get back on your feet.
outOfResources.embeddedDetail: Once you earn Gold, the GasStation will automatically swap it for ETH to cover future gas costs.
outOfResources.externalAdvice: Deposit ETH from your main wallet to continue playing.

allowance.buyPermission: In order to buy {{item}}, you need to give permission to spend {{price}} Gold.
allowance.sellPermissionShop: In order to sell {{item}}, you must allow the shop to manage your items.
allowance.sellPermissionMarketplace: In order to sell {{item}}, you must allow the marketplace to manage your items.
allowance.goldSpendPermission: Give permission to spend {{amount}} Gold with the Loot Manager?
allowance.itemPermission: Allow all items to be used by the Loot Manager?
allowance.shopAlwaysAllowTooltip: This allows you to spend Gold on Shops without having to approve each transaction. It is a faster and smoother experience.
allowance.marketplaceAlwaysAllowTooltip: This allows you to spend Gold on the Marketplace without having to approve each transaction. It is a faster and smoother experience.
allowance.lootManagerAlwaysAllowTooltip: This allows you to carry Gold without having to approve each transaction. It is a faster and smoother experience.
allowance.lootManagerSuccess: You can use your token with the Loot Manager.

battle.drawMessage: The battle ended in a draw! You both fled the battlefield.
battle.deathMessage: When you die, your health is restored, but you are forced to respawn at the Town Square.
battle.pvpShareText: Defeated {{name}} in PvP combat in Ultimate Dominion.
battle.itemShareText: Found {{rarity}}{{name}} in Ultimate Dominion. Every item is permanent, on-chain, and mine.

equip.wantEquip: Do you want to equip this item?
equip.wantUnequip: Do you want to unequip this item?
equip.wantOffer: Do you want to make an offer for this item?
equip.slotsFull: All equipment slots are full. Unequip something first.
equip.cannotEquipInBattle: You cannot equip items during a battle.
equip.cannotUnequipInBattle: You cannot unequip items during a battle.
equip.mustHaveWeapon: You must have at least 1 weapon or spell equipped in the Outer Realms.

fragment.allCollected: All {{total}} fragments collected. The fallen speak through you now. A badge has been forged in your name.
fragment.shareText: Discovered Fragment {{num}}: {{name}} in Ultimate Dominion. The fallen speak in riddles.

chat.title: Chat
chat.publicWarning: This chat is permanent and public to all other players. Do not share personal information or sensitive data.
chat.unlockMessage: Reach level 3 to unlock global chat and earn your Adventurer badge!
chat.keepAdventuring: Keep adventuring and defeating monsters to level up.
chat.publicDisclaimer: Ultimate Dominion's chat is public and permanent. Do not share personal information or sensitive data.

wallet.fundingPrompt: A small ETH deposit is needed to cover gameplay transaction fees. This stays in your session and can be withdrawn later.
wallet.resetConfirmBody: This will reset your game session. Any remaining ETH stays in the session and can be recovered.

invite.noCodes: No invite codes available. Earn more by reaching milestones:
invite.friendLevel5: Invited friend reaches Level 5 — bonus code

goldMerchant.title: Gold Merchant
goldMerchant.comingSoonMessage: The Gold Merchant is preparing his wares. You'll be able to purchase gold directly here soon.
goldMerchant.earnGoldNow: For now, earn gold through combat and trade on the marketplace.

consume.equippedReady: This consumable is equipped and ready for combat.
consume.useThroughBattle: Use consumables through the battle panel during combat.
consume.mustBeSpawned: You must be spawned to consume items.
consume.maxStacks: You have reached the maximum of this item you can consume at once.
